meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve Deployment Blocks for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional apps faster. A beginner-friendly checklist.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure usually stems from configuration drift and environment mismatch. The Antigravity project template solves this by providing a standardized, infrastructure-as-code foundation. Combined with Claude Code's autonomous execution, you can automate your CI/CD pipeline, eliminate environment variables errors, and ship production-ready applications to the cloud in minutes.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your client project, the design is pixel-perfect, but the deployment button feels like a trap door. You’re staring at a terminal full of cryptic error messages, dependency hell, and environment variables that refuse to cooperate. The gap between 'working on my machine' and 'live for the client' is the graveyard of freelance careers.

But what if you could bypass the chaos? The Antigravity project template isn't just boilerplate; it’s a hardened deployment architecture designed to neutralize configuration errors before they happen. By integrating this with Claude Code, you transform from a struggling developer into a high-velocity AI builder, turning complex deployments into a single, repeatable command.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a bulletproof folder structure that separates your logic from environment-specific configurations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity production-ready template with Next.js and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Environment Isolation
steps.description: Ensure your secrets are never hardcoded by mapping environment variables to the Antigravity schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an .env.example file and a schema validator to ensure all required deployment variables are present.

steps.title: Automate the Build Pipeline
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate a deployment script that audits your build process for common failure points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current build script and optimize it for Vercel/AWS deployment using the Antigravity best practices.

steps.title: Integrate Health Checks
steps.description: Add automated sanity checks that prevent the deployment from finalizing if critical paths are broken.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a deployment-time health check script to the Antigravity template that verifies database connectivity.

steps.title: Execute One-Click Deployment
steps.description: Trigger the final deployment sequence, leveraging the template's pre-configured hooks for seamless shipping.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment command that triggers the Antigravity build, test, and push sequence.

pro_tips: Always use a .env.vault or similar encrypted secret store; never commit local env files to Git.
Run 'claude diff' before committing to ensure the AI hasn't hallucinated unnecessary configuration changes.
Keep your build commands idempotent; if a deployment fails, it should be safe to run again immediately.
Use the 'antigravity-watch' mode during development to sync local changes with your cloud environment instantly.
Always include a 'rollback' script in your package.json, which Claude can generate based on your current deployment state.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, implement monitoring using the built-in Antigravity observability dashboard to track client-side errors in real-time.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop fighting your infrastructure and start focusing on the features your clients pay for. The Antigravity workflow is your new competitive advantage. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
